factors: Whether or not the farmer was heading to or away from the basket that the wizard added an apple to. Also, whether or not the wizard adding an apple changed the farmer's direction. When the farmer was going toward a basket and the wizard added an apple, I viewed that as the wizard allowing the farmer to choose that basket because he didn't try to get him to choose the other basket. When the farmer changed his mind after the wizard added an apple to the basket he was moving away from, I viewed that as the wizard causing the farmer to choose the other basket because the farmer would have chosen the basket he was heading for if the wizard hadn't intervened.
